shorts.description: Over ten years since the last episode, ‘The Office US’ is still one of the all-time favorites. This mockumentary about the oddball staff at Dunder Mifflin in Scranton, Pennsylvania, first hit screens in 2005 and stuck around for nine seasons, wrapping up in 2…

shorts.title: Food donated to TSA workers during funding cut
shorts.title_distilled: Food donated to TSA workers during funding cut.
shorts.description: AVOCA, LUZERNE COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — TSA officers have been caught in the middle of the funding fight. Without money coming in, it makes buying basic necessities and putting food on the table extremely hard. Thursday, the Luzerne County Sports Hall of Fame donated more than $200 worth of food at Wilkes-Barre Scranton International Airport in [...]
shorts.content: AVOCA, LUZERNE COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — TSA officers have been caught in the middle of the funding fight. Without money coming in, it makes buying basic necessities and putting food on the table extremely hard. Thursday, the Luzerne County Sports Hall of Fame donated more than $200 worth of food at Wilkes-Barre Scranton International Airport in [...]

shorts.title: Scranton announced to be FIFA Fan Zone for World Cup
shorts.title_distilled: Scranton announced to be FIFA Fan Zone for World Cup.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Gov. Josh Shapiro announced Thursday the Electric City will be one of three host sites for World Cup watch parties this summer, also known as FIFA Fan Zones. At home, Lackawanna County's Visitors Bureau was already planning marketing efforts to bring people to Scranton. "Being equidistant from Philadelphia where Philadelphia [...]

shorts.title: Man faces new charge after deadly wrong-way crash
shorts.title_distilled: Man faces new charge after deadly wrong-way crash.
shorts.description: COVINGTON TWP., LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Investigators stated they have upgraded the charges against a man who was allegedly driving drunk and caused a deadly wrong-way crash on I-380. Police are now charging 37-year-old Mark Castillo with third-degree murder, after they say he drove the wrong way and crashed into a car on Interstate 380 [...]
shorts.content: COVINGTON TWP., LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Investigators stated they have upgraded the charges against a man who was allegedly driving drunk and caused a deadly wrong-way crash on I-380. Police are now charging 37-year-old Mark Castillo with third-degree murder, after they say he drove the wrong way and crashed into a car on Interstate 380 [...]
